zh.lifeSummary: 當Martha Wilmouth於1701年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州斯塔福德時，她的父親Nicholas John Wilmouth21歲，母親Mary Tysen Swaim21歲。她於1717年與Nicholas George IV在美國加州溫圖拉波普阿可弗吉尼亞 可隆尼結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Martha Wilmouth于1701年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州斯塔福德时，她的父亲Nicholas John Wilmouth21岁，母亲Mary Tysen Swaim21岁。她于1717年与Nicholas George IV在美国加州溫圖拉波普阿可弗吉尼亞 可隆尼结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Wilmouth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Martha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, of Aramaic rather than Hebrew origin, meaning ‘lady’. It was borne by the sister of Lazarus and Mary of Bethany (John 11:1). According to Luke 10:38, when Jesus visited the house of Mary and Martha, Mary sat at his feet, listening to him, while Martha ‘was cumbered about much serving’, so that she complained to Jesus, ‘Lord, dost thou not care that my sister hath left me to serve alone?’ For this reason, the name Martha has always been associated with hard domestic work, as opposed to the contemplative life.

historicEvents.description: "Patrick Henry made his ""Give me Liberty or Give me Death"" speech in Richmond Virginia."

en.lifeSummary: When Martha Wilmouth was born in 1701, in Stafford, Virginia, British Colonial America, her father, Nicholas John Wilmouth, was 21 and her mother, Mary Tysen Swaim, was 21. She married Nicholas George IV in 1717, in Virginia Colony, Moorpark, Ventura, California, United States. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Martha Wilmouth est née en 1701, à Stafford, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Nicholas John Wilmouth, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Mary Tysen Swaim, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Nicholas George IV en 1717, à Virginia Colony, Moorpark, Ventura, Californie, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Als Martha Wilmouth 1701 in Stafford, Virginia, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Nicholas John Wilmouth 21 und ihre Mutter Mary Tysen Swaim 21. Sie hat 1717 in Virginia Colony, Moorpark, Ventura, Kalifornien, Vereinigte Staaten Nicholas George IV geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Martha Wilmouth è nata il nel 1701 nel Stafford, Virginia, British Colonial America, sua padre, Nicholas John Wilmouth, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Mary Tysen Swaim, aveva 21 anni. ja.lifeSummary: Martha Wilmouthが1701年にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州スタフォードで生まれた時，父Nicholas John Wilmouthは21歳，母Mary Tysen Swaimは21歳であった。1717年にアメリカ合衆国カリフォルニア州ベントゥラムールパークバージニア コロニーでNicholas George IVと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Martha Wilmouth(이)가 1701년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 스태퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Nicholas John Wilmouth(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Tysen Swaim(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1717년 미국 캘리포니아 주 븐투라 무르박 버지니아 콜론이에서 Nicholas George IV(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Martha Wilmouth родилась в 1701 г. в местности стаффорд, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Nicholas John Wilmouth было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Mary Tysen Swaim, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Nicholas George IV в 1717 г. в местности виргиня колони, мурпарк, вентура, Калифорния, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь.
